ideation: This animation sequence depicts a woman in a motorized wheelchair, focusing on arm movements that suggest control and engagement with the environment. The arms will move in a way that hints at operating the wheelchair's controls, and then settle into a relaxed posture. Frame 1 shows both arms slightly raised, hands near the controls, suggesting active engagement. Frame 2 shows the right arm moving to a more relaxed, downward position, after the user has completed a task. Frame 3 shows the left arm moving to a more relaxed position, as the user shifts their posture. Frame 4 shows both arms resting at the user's sides, suggesting a moment of rest or contemplation.

frames.beat: both arms rest at the sides, ready to go
the right arm lowers, task completed
the left arm lowers, settling into the chair
both arms rest, the journey continues
